decision: Do not authorize BALL GPU training from this judge yet.

closed: Pinned ledger and fingerprint are checked
open: The import ledger contains no distinct job_id.
The import ledger contains no imported image-ZIP digest.
task_fingerprint hashes the image path, not its bytes.
The current image ZIP SHA-256 f1b7ba88084c8664202bf19f73e4704599b46bd42e50e2a6c1a29265cff8b653 is absent from the provenance contract.
Injected wrong job_id and image_zip_sha256 values were ignored by the validator.
2_task87_provenance.impact: The gate cannot cryptographically prove that task 87 was annotated against the exact current image bytes.

4_canonical_protected_set.gap: Production still accepts a collision_hamming_threshold override, including 0; pin the production threshold to 3.

evidence.rule: Absent original prediction is confirmed only when final visibility is exactly none; out_of_frame is a correction.

6_new_failure_attribution.conclusion: The five failures came from an intermediate P1 exporter snapshot and are not B0 regressions.

additional_blocker.finding: The canonical/default artifact remains the unsafe pre-fix judge.
details: split/report.json still says BALL_CLEAN_JUDGE while lacking attestation, lineage hashes, canonical-set verification, and corrected visibility counts.
Its 73 validation negatives remain ground_truth=true without attestation status.

required_before_acceptance: Bind task 87 to an independently recorded job ID and the exact imported image-ZIP SHA-256, preferably by re-importing with a byte-hashing importer or exhaustively reconciling all CVAT task frames to the package.
Promote one attested artifact to the canonical/default path and retire or invalidate the stale split/ report.
Rerun the wide suite after all concurrent lanes stabilize and record the reviewed source/test hashes.
